title: Simply Modded
description: Adventure | Dungeons | Overhauled Structures | Additional Biomes | Additional Dimension | Mob and Entity Tweaks |
body:
This is a modpack for a private server hosted by yours truely.

Keep updating this modpack as we go along so we can have the most up to date mods and keep things running smoothly.

If you managed to find this, good job. Feel free to use it as you wish.



In this modpack, you will find a bunch of new structures, overhauled villages, randomly generated ruins, newly made dungeons, and plenty of new biomes. There are even new cave biomes to play around in and you might even find yourself in a sticky situation when exploring these new caves. 

There is also a returning classic dimention to play around in adding more content to explore. This dimention has its own ores to mine and smelt. Explore new dungeons and acheive great rewards from three teirs of rewards. Beat the bosses of these dungeons and recive weapons, armor and new accesories that can make you look cool while also providing a small bonus.



There will be new aditions to come. I have big plans for this modpack and hope to surpass 150 mods. So this modpack will constantly be updated with new things. 
- Note: This modpack has already surpassed 150 mods. The new 2.0.0 updated has come to a grand total of 171 mods. Whilst this is just a passion project for me, I am honored to become the entertainment for the whole 3 people still playing this modpack.
